mapper.update: update user_anime set anime_id = #{animeId}, watch_status = #{watchStatus}, current_episode = #{currentEpisode}, score = #{score}, is_favorite = #{isFavorite}, start_date = #{startDate}, finish_date = #{finishDate}, last_watch_time = #{lastWatchTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
update user_anime set current_episode = #{currentEpisode}, last_watch_time = now() where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from user_anime where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select * from user_anime where user_id = #{userId} and anime_id = #{animeId} limit 1

select ua.id, ua.anime_id, a.name as anime_name, a.cover_url, a.total_episodes, a.type, ua.watch_status, ua.current_episode, ua.score, ua.is_favorite, ua.start_date, ua.finish_date, ua.last_watch_time, ua.remark from user_anime ua left join anime a on ua.anime_id = a.id where ua.id = #{id} and ua.user_id = #{userId}

select sum(case when watch_status = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as want_watch_count, sum(case when watch_status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as watching_count, sum(case when watch_status = 2 then 1 else 0 end) as watched_count, sum(case when watch_status = 3 then 1 else 0 end) as shelved_count, sum(case when watch_status = 4 then 1 else 0 end) as dropped_count, coalesce(sum(current_episode), 0) as total_episodes_watched from user_anime where user_id = #{userId}
